service.name: HubSpot CRM API
service.description_for_ai: Free CRM with 1.7M+ companies using it. Contacts, companies, deals, tickets, emails. Marketing automation, sales pipeline, customer support. Free tier very generous. Use for CRM integration, lead management, sales automation.

auth.how_to_get: Settings → Integrations → Private Apps → Create app

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get CRM contacts with properties. Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination. Returns up to 100 contacts per page.

filterGroups.description: [{filters: [{propertyName: 'email', operator: 'EQ', value: 'test@example.com'}]}] — filter by any property. Operators: EQ, NEQ, LT, LTE, GT, GTE, CONTAINS_TOKEN, NOT_CONTAINS_TOKEN

properties.description: List of property names to return: ['email', 'firstname', 'lastname', 'phone', 'company', 'lifecyclestage', 'hs_lead_status']

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a new CRM contact with email, name, phone, and any custom properties.

properties.description: Contact properties: {email: 'user@example.com', firstname: 'John', lastname: 'Doe', phone: '+1234567890', company: 'Acme Inc', lifecyclestage: 'lead', hs_lead_status: 'NEW'}

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a sales deal in HubSpot pipeline with amount, stage, and close date.

properties.description: {dealname: 'Enterprise License', amount: '50000', dealstage: 'presentationscheduled', closedate: '2024-03-31', pipeline: 'default', hubspot_owner_id: 'owner_id'}

agent_hints.auth: Create Private App in HubSpot: Settings → Integrations → Private Apps → Create. Scopes needed: crm.objects.contacts.read/write, crm.objects.deals.read/write
agent_hints.free_crm: HubSpot CRM is genuinely free for unlimited contacts and deals. API included.
agent_hints.pagination: Use search API (POST) instead of list API (GET) for filtering. Paginate with paging.next.after cursor.
agent_hints.properties: Get all available properties via GET /crm/v3/properties/contacts — HubSpot has 100s of built-in + unlimited custom.
